creator: matt@stuffbymatt.ca
text:
This bug does not appear to be completely fixed. I am experiencing the same kind of buggy behavior on 11.0-RELEASE-p3 with Thunar-1.6.10_2 while trying to rename single files.

My /usr/home where I experience this behavior is an NFS mount with the following options in the autofs config file:

-intr,hard,noatime,rsize=32768,wsize=32768

Has anyone else experienced this problem?
